summary: Tested all 9 doctrinal architecture corrections for REACH, Ground 0, AUTO, and 16 Deadly Sins. All items pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Ground0Page accordion G0-6 module still shows old title 'The GO / WAIT / NO-GO Decision' (line 53 of Ground0Page.jsx) in the MODULES array used for the accordion display — but this is a static info panel, not the lesson player. The actual lesson title in Ground0LessonPlayer is correctly set to 'The REACH Qualification' (line 129). Low risk but may confuse users who read the briefing page before entering the portal.

Ground0Page body text on line 173 still says 'By the end, you'll confirm your decision: GO, WAIT, or NO-GO.' — this implies the old self-select flow. Could be updated to reference REACH as the qualification engine.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All doctrinal architecture corrections verified. Ground0Page.jsx MODULES array at line 53 still has old G0-6 accordion title 'The GO / WAIT / NO-GO Decision' — this is a minor copy inconsistency vs the actual lesson player title. /resources/reach-wait and /resources/reach-nogo pages are live and rendering correctly.
